title: Senior Software Engineer - 1mg Capital India - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - 1mg Capital India - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at 1mg Capital India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Coimbatore-based team.

About 1mg Capital India:
1mg Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 1mg Capital India!
